---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

If you want, you can download my CV from here. —–\> [Download my CV](cv.pdf)

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - ongoing.
-   Gazi Anadolu Highschool, Turkey, 2017-2021

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Startop App, Co-founder and CMO, 2025 - ongoing

## Internships

1.  Selnikel, Purchasing intern, 2025

2.  Leka Proje, Quality Control intern, 2024

# Projects

1.  Development of an Optimization-Based Decision Support System for Sheet Metal Cutting Planning at HIDROMEK

2.  Development of a Decision Support System for Single Forklift Internal Logistics at HIDROMEK

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, Microsoft Office Package (Excel, Powerpoint, Word), AutoCad 2D-3D, Adobe Premiere Pro, Canva, Matlab,

# Hobbies

Playing and watching basketball, football, volleyball and table tennis. Playing board games.
